description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a sleek, low-profile design and a matte black finish. The keys are individually backlit with RGB lighting, creating a vibrant spectrum of colors across the entire keyboard. The layout includes a standard alphanumeric section, function keys, arrow keys, and a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The keycaps are flat and slightly concave, with white legends that stand out against the dark background and are illuminated by the backlighting. The keyboard's frame appears to be made of durable plastic, with a slightly raised profile for ergonomic typing. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface.
description: A full-size, matte black keyboard with RGB backlit keys and a standard layout including a numeric keypad. The key legends are white and illuminated, and the frame is sleek and low-profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entire keyboard layout, including the alphanumeric section, function keys, and numeric keypad, with RGB lighting visible across all keys.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the slim profile and the colorful backlighting on the keys, with the numeric keypad more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the keyboard and the even distribution of RGB lighting, with the key layout less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the left side of the keyboard, showing the alphanumeric keys and the gradient of RGB lighting.
